stories.headline: PM Modi warns global energy crisis risks erasing decades of progress and returning massive poverty

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body:
🚨 BIG STATEMENT

🇮🇳 PM Modi warns over the global energy crisis: “This is becoming a decade of crisis for the world.”

“If things don’t CHANGE, the achievements of the last few decades could be ERASED and MASSIVE poverty may return.”

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body:
Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi said he's worried for the future of India and the planet.
"First came the corona pandemic, then wars began to break out, and now there is an energy crisis. This decade is turning into a decade of disasters for the world."

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Held fruitful talks with PM Jonas Gahr Støre in Oslo. One of the key highlights was the upgrading of our bilateral partnership to a Green Strategic Partnership, which will deepen synergy in clean energy, sustainable growth, the blue economy, green shipping and more.

stories.headline: Putin arrives in Beijing for Russia-China summit on multipolar world declaration

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🇷🇺 "A multipolar world means no hegemons. Even with giants like India and China, no single nation should dominate global politics. Everyone must be equal." — Putin

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Putin is heading to China, where Russia and China are expected to sign around 40 agreements and unveil a declaration on a “multipolar world.” Trump came home with no deals. The contrast is humiliating.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: After decades of pushing the man-made climate change is going to destroy the planet the top UN science committee admits finally they got it wrong.

stories.headline: Trump administration rolls back Biden-era PFAS drinking water protections

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Key Biden-era regulations designed to protect the nation’s drinking water from the most dangerous cancer-causing per-and polyfluoroalkyl substances, or PFAS, have been removed by the Trump administration.

stories.headline: SEC set to release innovation exemption for tokenized stocks
stories.body:
BREAKING: The SEC is set to release its so-called "innovation exemption" for tokenized stocks which will pave the path for trading digital versions of securities, per Bloomberg.

Details include:

1. In a "surprise move," the SEC is leaning toward allowing the trading of tokenized assets

2. These tokenized assets would be tradeable on decentralized crypto platforms

3. The move could "reshape the landscape of the American stock market"

4. This would also be one of the US' biggest shifts into crypto infrastructure yet

Tokenized assets are rapidly expanding.

stories.headline: Trump traded stocks over 3,700 times in Q1 2026
stories.body: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 President Trump traded stocks over 3,700 times in Q1 2026 - averaging 59 trades per day, 9 per hour, or one trade every 7 minutes.

stories.headline: Elon Musk discusses OpenAI lawsuit and plans appeal
stories.body:
Regarding the OpenAI case, the judge & jury never actually ruled on the merits of the case, just on a calendar technicality. 

There is no question to anyone following the case in detail that Altman & Brockman did in fact enrich themselves by stealing a charity. The only question is WHEN they did it!

I will be filing an appeal with the Ninth Circuit, because creating a precedent to loot charities is incredibly destructive to charitable giving in America.

OpenAI was founded to benefit all of humanity.

stories.headline: Ryan Murphy calls Madonna the most important artist of the last 50 years.
stories.body:
Ryan Murphy says Madonna is the “most important artist of the last 50 years”:

“No one comes close in cultural import, other than Taylor Swift and Paul McCartney, both of whom are truly incredible artists for the ages. […] The hate Madonna has received, and survived. It's beyond comprehension. There is no one in my lifetime who has meant more to me, or had more of an impact on art, fashion, music,
ALL OF IT. Than Madonna.”

stories.headline: Japanese pork shabu salad recipe with tomato and onion
stories.body: 暑くなると食べたくなる1番好きな豚しゃぶの食べ方。豚肉250gをサッと茹で、トマト1個、新玉ねぎ、オリーブオイルと酢は大さじ2、レモン汁と砂糖は大さじ1、塩小さじ1/2、ブラックペッパーを入れてよく混ぜる。あまりにも美味すぎるのでいつも倍量作ってしまう...
